type-check commands. Produce a structured failure report. For EACH failure: the shortest reproducer

failures by likely root cause so a fix touches the smallest surface. You REPORT; you never push fixes.
Report only what the output shows — do not invent failures.

BRANCH: Branch: feat/payment-retry. Commands: `pnpm test`, `pnpm lint`, `pnpm typecheck`. The test run produced:
FAIL src/payment/retry.test.ts > retries on 503

    at src/payment/retry.test.ts:42:18
FAIL src/payment/retry.test.ts > backoff doubles each attempt
  AssertionError: expected 200 to equal 400
    at src/payment/retry.test.ts:58:20
Run all three commands and summarise the failures.
